## Summary
[Describe the core intent of this change]

## Type of Change
- [ ] feat: A new feature
- [ ] fix: A bug fix
- [ ] refactor: A code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature
- [ ] chore: Maintenance or configuration change

## Checklist
- [ ] I have updated AGENTS.md to reflect these changes (if applicable).
- [ ] I have followed the project's commit and PR title standards.
- [ ] I have verified the changes behaviorally.
- [ ] No emojis or bot-style comments were included.
